---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```
# stathelper

Small helper functions for teaching and learning statistics.

## Installation

```r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("YOUR_GITHUB_NAME/stathelper")
